name: @devicesdk/website
description: DeviceSDK marketing website and documentation (Vue 3 + Vite SSG)
author: DeviceSDK <hello@devicesdk.com>

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p static/docs/api && (test -f ../server/openapi.json || (echo 'ERROR: ../server/openapi.json missing. Run "pnpm --filter @devicesdk/server build" first, or use "pnpm build" from the monorepo root.' >&2 && exit 1)) && cp ../server/openapi.json static/docs/api/openapi.json && node generate-agent-skills.js && node generate-og.js && pnpm run build-content && vite-ssg build && tsx scripts/post-build.ts
scripts.clean: rm -rf dist .vite-ssg-temp static/docs/api static/og-images static/llms.txt static/llms-full.txt static/sitemap.xml
